description_for_human: Register a client public key, obtain one-time encrypted challenges, and read or write encrypted KV payloads without exposing plaintext to the AI.
description_for_model: CNothing AuthAI KV is a public MCP server for challenge-based AI-safe identity registration and encrypted KV storage. The AI should never request or handle private keys. Instead, it registers a client public key, receives an encrypted one-time challenge for the client backend, and then forwards auth and data envelopes produced by that backend for kv save/read operations.

tools.name: get_authai_public_key
tools.description: Return the authai public key metadata used to encrypt auth and data envelopes toward CNothing.

tools.name: authai_register
tools.description: Register a client public key and receive an encrypted one-time challenge for the client backend.

tools.name: authai_refresh
tools.description: Consume a valid auth envelope and issue the next encrypted challenge for the client backend.

tools.name: kv_save
tools.description: Save one or more encrypted KV items for the authenticated client namespace.

tools.name: kv_read
tools.description: Read encrypted KV items for the authenticated client namespace and return the result encrypted to the client public key.
